sentence: 街角的杂货店每天早上六点开门。
pinyin: Jiējiǎo de záhuòdiàn měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn kāimén.
english: The grocery store on the corner opens at six every morning.

sentence: 这家工厂专门冶炼铜和铝。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngchǎng zhuānmén yěliàn tóng hé lǚ.
english: This factory specializes in smelting copper and aluminum.

meaning: 1. material for making clothes; 2. CL:塊|块[kuài]
sentence: 这件外套的面料非常柔软舒适。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn wàitào de miànliào fēicháng róuruǎn shūshì.
english: The fabric of this jacket is very soft and comfortable.

sentence: 大公司吞并了几家小型竞争对手。
pinyin: Dà gōngsī tūnbìng le jǐ jiā xiǎoxíng jìngzhēng duìshǒu.
english: The large company annexed several small competitors.

sentence: 政府努力提高全体市民的福祉。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ nǔlì tígāo quántǐ shìmín de fúzhǐ.
english: The government works hard to improve the well-being of all citizens.
